title: paeonia × baokangensis
intro: Paeonia × baokangensis, also known as Baokang peony or Chinese peony, is a rare and hybrid species of peony that is native to China. This plant has been used in traditional Chinese medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and analgesic effects. The health benefits of Paeonia × baokangensis include reducing pain and inflammation, improving sleep quality, and regulating menstrual cycles. It is often used in herbal preparations such as teas, infusions, and tinctures, as well as being used in combination with other herbs to enhance its medicinal properties.
